title: Transparent signs
description:
Tool to quickly create new text from 1.19.4
Can be used on servers, even in survival!
body:
[![Transparent signs](https://i.ytimg.com/vi/VbFnUqiKlMA/maxresdefault.jpg)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VbFnUqiKlMA "Transparent signs")
Tool to quickly create new text from 1.19.4
Can be used on servers, even in survival!
It will also be useful for admins.
Tablets turn invisible with an invisibility potion!
I'm waiting for your feedback and suggestions, there are many more ideas, so stay tuned for the next versions...
How it works you can see in the video or use the link below

[Map demonstrations and training](drive.google.com/file/d/14zskn_nY1KJCqLE4HVDt_fqCUzWFmURe/view?usp=sharing)
